sizing_rule.note: Risk 2% of account equity per trade using formula: position_size = account_equity * 0.02 / (entry_price - stop_loss_price). Limited to max 5 concurrent positions. This is Van Tharp's foundational 1R/2% money management rule.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is the primary driver of trading system performance; identical entry/exit signals produce vastly different returns when position sizing varies, making it the critical fourth dimension of system design.
